MODULE: cosmos.core.nlp.command_router
FILE: cosmos/core/nlp/command_router.py (371 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Command Router for Natural Language Tasks.

Routes parsed intents to appropriate handlers.

CLASSES:
- CommandResult: Result of executing a command.
- CommandRouter: Route natural language commands to appropriate handlers.

Integrates with:
- Ban
  Methods: async def execute(self, command: str) -> CommandResult
